title: Artificial Academy w/tons of extras
description:
Artificial Academy is an eroge high school social simulation, spun off from Illusion's Artificial Girl series, released by Illusion on June 10, 2011. Create and play any of up to 25 students of varying gender, orientation and other interaction abilities and personal inclinations. Make friends, lovers and possibly enemies as the class competes for achievement in academics, athletics, popularity, and romance.  
  
Unpack the RAR file in the ISO+MDS folder. If you need help installing the game, go to http://scratchpad.wikia.com/wiki/Artificial\_Academy or http://www.hongfire.com/forum/showthread.php/350425-illusion-Artificial-Academy-FAQ-amp-Discussion.  
  
This archive is split into two folders. The ISO-MDS folder contains everything you need to install/patch the game. The AAExtras folder contains mods, utilities, characters and saved games.

title: 『girlcelly』 [101029] [sprite] 恋と選挙とチョコレート 初回限定特装版 + Bonus + Tokuten + Original Soundtrack + Update [Serial + No DVD Patch is included] [Request] [H-Game + HCG]
description:
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/1101688-WBLPTGL.jpg)  
  
**Info:  
<http://sprite.gr.jp/products/koichoco>  
<http://www.getchu.com/soft.phtml?id=670738>  
  
Quote:girlcelly

  
Um...Getting tired of to make this game working or you are confusing about how to bypass Serial checking ? Now is your time to download this working version ^^  
  
I still remember in 2010, when this game out, it were big hit for first debut and the only one product by sprite back then until now, about how art work, story, music are good, besides, this is also troublesome game. A lot of people who want play it so bad but all gave up...  
  
This is working version, it is different version I was uploaded in 2010, file size also smaller, there is Dummy Cut around but no need to searching since file size is 3.5GB while mine is 3.8GB ! :D  
  
I were planning to reupload it in mind after watching Anime, and quite a lot people who want me to do so, they want to play the game, because Anime is good so far ^^  
  
Now, I will tell you steps by steps to install and play:  
  
1- Extract, mounting image files and install game as usual  
2- Update game with ksc\_updater.zip to fixing some bugs and errors may occur  
3- Extract No DVD Patch to get start.exe, copy and paste it into folder where you installed game  
4- Play game by hit start.exe, it will ask you for Serial  
5- Open Serial.txt, copy and paste, it will let you pass  
6- Happy playing ^\_^  
  
Note:  
  
1- Extra at Main Menu is not clickable till you clear all routes in order to unlock !  
2- Because Extra is not unlock, so follow walkthrough is good choice, I suppose  
3- A small bug with Isara route 青海 衣更 (Aomi Isara), the girl who ran into main character in Anime if you watched it, even when you completed her route but it still marked as "not clear". But it can be fixed if you updated game which I am not really sure...  
3- Back up save file more often, you can find where savedata locate in 恋と選挙とチョコレート 一部環境での問題改善updater.mht  
  
Walkthrough:  
  
<http://www.foolmaker.net/game/k/koichoco.html>  
  
I also included HCG for people who needed, lucky that my torrent back then still seeded ! :D  
  
Here is proof if you do not believe me, Sumiyoshi Chisato is good but Shinonome Satsuki is the best ! \*kuku\*  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/1105627-ANO0S1O.jpg)  
  
Wow, it been a while since last time I wrote that much ^\_^



  
  
More information can be found at:  
  
<http://www.anime-sharing.com/forum/torrents-47/japanese-75571/>**

title: Grisaia no Kajitsu -LE FRUIT DE LA GRISAIA-
description:
Description  
Mihama Academy - on the surface, a closed learning environment established to nurture students who find themselves at odds with the world around them; in actuality, an orchard-cum-prison built to preserve fruit that has fallen too far from its tree.  
  
Whatever the circumstances behind its establishment, Mihama Academy is at present home to five female students, all with their own reasons for "enrollment." For better or worse, each girl has established a routine obliging of her current situation; life moves at an idle, yet accommodating pace within the walls of Mihama.  
  
Yet with the arrival of the institute's first male student, the nearly preposterously opaque Kazami Yuuji, the students at Mihama begin to fall out of step with their predetermined rhythms. Will Yuuji prove to be the element the girls around him needed to take hold of their lives once more, or will the weight of their pasts prove too steep a wall to overcome?  
  
And in the first place, just who is Kazami Yuuji? While the true nature of the "job" he is wont to alight to at the most haphazard of moments remains shrouded in secrecy, one thing is for certain - his encroachment upon the quiet orchard known as Mihama Academy will prove itself momentous in one way or another. And of course, one cannot discount the possibility that perhaps Yuuji himself carries the weightiest past of any of the students...
